awesomeList.description: A curated list of awesome READMEs

nodes.itemHTML: • Amazing GitHub Templatestars27 - Useful README.md, LICENSE, CONTRIBUTING.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, SECURITY.md, GitHub Issues, Pull Requests and Actions templates to jumpstart your projects.
• READMINEstars12 - A thorough, clear and self-describing README file template for software projects; copy it and edit it as needed.

• priyavrat-misra/xrays-and-gradcamstars14 - TOC for easy navigation. Clear introduction of what the project does. Complete list of all files in the repo and what their function is. Usage section. Clean and concise tables.
• Readme.so - A simple editor that allows you to quickly add and customize all the sections you need for your project's readme.
• "Readme Driven Development" - Tom Preston-Werner
• Gifskistars5.3k - FREE - More vivid colors than the rest, but still keep size low
• dowjones/react-dropdown-tree-selectstars348 - Clear readme with GIF screenshot for quick demo. Multiple badges, concise ToC, online playground, storybook, detailed description and more.
• iterative/dvcstars7.9k - ReStructuredText format example, PyPi compatible. Logo, custom website-like menu. Smooth how-it-works animation. Badges. Nice contribution section with the hall-of-fame.
• ngcolombia/medellinstars145 - Project banner. Badges for stats. Well placed emoticons. Contributor's photos.

• rayhanadev/rayhanadevstars5 - Dynamic statistics. Black and white theme. Polished layout. Quick, skimmable tables with contributions and current projects. Linked technology badges to home website. Secret steganography in an image.
• Rebilly/redocstars13.8k - Multiple badges, project logo, live demo link, GIF-animations of the key features, TL;DR usage.
• release-it/release-itstars4.1k - Clear overview of project features with a demo GIF. Badges. Expandable TOC. Usage description and examples. Contribution guidelines. Detailed releases.
• sidneycadot/oeisstars31 - Overview. List of required dependencies. Complete list of all files in the repo and what their function is. Visual graph of how it all ties together.
• terminalizerstars11.5k - FREE - Record your terminal and generate animated gif images or share a web player
• PostHog/posthogstars4.1k - Custom-made section icons, demo GIF, deploy button, profile images for contributors, concise, clear structure, project logo.

• easybase/easybase-reactstars39 - Project banner and logo. Badges. Expandable walkthrough sections. Concise description and purpose. TOC for easy navigation. GIFs for installation demo. Multiple informative visuals.

• ma-shamshiri/Human-Activity-Recognitionstars1 - Beautiful table of contents. Project logo. Animated project banner. Complete project folder structure. Clear description of what the project does. Nice contributors’ section. Easy navigation.

• ma-shamshiri/Pacman-Gamestars3 - Beautiful table of contents. Project logo. Animated project banner. Suitable GIFs to display each part of the project. Complete list of project files in the repo along with their function. Complete execution instruction.
• ma-shamshiri/Spam-Detectorstars0 - Complete project file description. Project logo. Animated project banner. Concise project description. Clear execution instruction.

• create-go-app/clistars388 - Clean project logo. Useful badges (version, code style, test cover, docs). Clear readme with quickstart, understandable installation and usage manual, video screencast, ToC with well-documented project features (with a demo recording of the work in the terminal), project philosophy notes ("the why another"), most frequently asked questions, and more.

• gofiber/fiberstars13.3k - Clean project logo. Useful badges and links (languages switcher, code style, test cover, docs, Discord channel). Clear description of what the project does with quickstart, benchmark charts, well-documented code examples (with the ability to hide long content), project philosophy notes ("the why of project"), tables with project addons, list of contributors, star growth statistics, and more.

• MananTank/radioactive-statestars280 - Badges (version, downloads, coverage, size), Twitter Intent, Project Logo, Feature list, Motivation, Installation, Example with GIFs, Emojis, Collapsible Sections, Live Demos, API detailed usage, FAQs, Chat link.
• sulu/sulustars671 - Project logo, useful badges, clear instructions on where to find more information and report bugs, GIF screenshots, nice use of emoticons.
• React Parallax Tiltstars297 - GIF demo. Multiple badges. Feature list. Great live demo with code examples. Easy to follow instructions for local development set up.
• ScreenToGifstars14.3k - FREE - Open source, customizable UI and easily editable GIFs, easy to get started.
• ai/size-limitstars4.2k - Project logo, clear description, screenshot, step-by-step installing instructions.

• aimeos/aimeos-typo3stars165 - Project logo. Clear description of what the project does. Demo screenshot. TOC for easy navigation. Easy installation and setup sections with screenshots. Links for further reading.
• alichtman/strongholdstars832 - Project logo. Clear description of what the project does. GIF Demo. TOC for easy navigation. Badges. Links for further reading. Simple install instructions.
• amitmerchant1990/electron-markdownifystars723 - Project logo. Minimalist description of what it is. GIF demo of the project. Key features. How to install guide. Credits.
• anfederico/Clairvoyantstars2.2k - Multiple badges. Clean logo. Simple install instructions. Clear overview of the project accompanied by a schematic. GIF demo. Extensive code examples.
• Armync/Arminc-AutoExecstars75 - Rich Markdown functions, modern layout, clear description and compliant with the recommended community standards.
• athityakumar/colorlsstars3.6k - Multiple badges. Clean screenshots. Simple install instructions. TOC for easy navigation. Good contributor guidelines.
• ccostan/Home-AssistantConfigstars3.4k - Project Banner. Badges. Easy navigation.
• choojs/choostars6.6k - Badges, clean, clear. Beautiful little menu above the fold with useful links. An FAQ inside of it for the main questions. Backers. Good language.
• Day8/re-framestars4.8k - Badges, logo, TOC, etc. Stands out by being a giant, well-written essay about the tech, how to use it, the philosophy behind it, and how it fits into the greater ecosystem.

• github-changelog-generator/github-changelog-generatorstars6.4k - TOC for easy navigation. Concise project description. Installation and usage sections. Output example. Great feature overview. List of alternatives. FAQ.
• gitpoint/git-pointstars4.5k - Clear description. Project Logo. App Store logos. TOC. Clean screenshots. List of features. Detailed installation process. Landing Page.

• Hexworks/Zirconstars567 - Dogfood in readme. Clear description of what the project does. Demo screenshot. TOC for easy navigation. Easy installation and setup sections with screenshots. Links for further reading.

• iharsh234/WebAppstars60 - Project landing page. Clear description of what the project does. Demo screenshot. Simple install and usage sections. Includes an examples section with common uses and a mobile demo section.

• jakubroztocil/httpiestars4 - Description of what the project does. Demo screenshots. Project logo. TOC for easy navigation. Build badges. Quick and simple installation and usage sections. Includes an examples section.
• karan/joestars2.8k - Project logo. Clear description of what the project does. GIF demo. Easy install and usage sections.

• Martinsos/edlibstars302 - Informative badges (build, version, publication). Concise description. Feature list. TOC. Screenshots. Concise instructions with examples for building and including in your project. Common code examples to get you started quickly.
• nhn/tui.editorstars12.9k - Project logo. Clear overview of project features with a demo GIF. Badges. TOC for easy navigation. Colorful icons in front of titles.
• node-chatstars659 - Project screenshot. Informative badges. Clear description. Easy installation/use instructions. Live demo.
• NSRare/NSGIFstars902 - Project logo. GIF Demo. Usage artwork. Usage code samples.
• php-censor/php-censorstars625 - Multiple badges, project logo, screenshots, step-by-step installing and upgrading instructions, TOC for easy navigation.
• React on lambdastars196 - Project logo, comics to present the main idea, badges, examples with code snippets, demo projects, api documentations, editor configurations.
• rstacruz/hicatstars382 - GIF demo. Easy installation and setup sections with screenshots. Build badges. Great examples of use cases.
• ryanoasis/nerd-fontsstars27.9k - Clean project logo. Brief description at top. Sankey diagram, quick links, badges, OS specific icons, TOC, detailed release changelog.
• sebyddd/SDVersionstars1.3k - Project logo. Build badges. Documentation structuring for multiple programming languages. Usage examples.
• shama/gazestars1.1k - Project logo. Concise description. Feature list. Usage section. FAQ. Great API documentation. Release history.

• sindresorhus/pageresstars9.2k - Project logo. Clear description of what the project does. Build badges. Demo screenshot. Simple install and usage sections. Includes an examples section with common uses.
• sourcerer-io/sourcerer-appstars6.6k - Clean animated screenshot. Customized call to action badge. Usage showcase.
• sr6033/ltermstars41 - Clean logo using characters. Brief updates on development. Detailed contribution guidelines. Contribution suggestions.
• supunlakmal/thismypcstars135 - Project logo. Useful badges. Web site URL. Screenshot. GIF step-by-step instructions for installation. Project folder structure.
• teles/array-mixerstars30 - Clean project logo, badges. Table of contents. Contributing section. Many illustrated examples.

• thelounge/theloungestars4.3k - Project logo. Useful badges and links (website, docs, demo). Screenshot. Feature list. Step-by-step instructions for installation, development, and testing. Link to the contributing guide. Good mobile summary.
• vhesener/Closuresstars1.7k - Project logo, cognitive funnel, animated examples. Color coordinated. Clean documentation.
• "Art of Readme - Learn the art of writing quality READMEs."stars5.8k - Stephen Whitmore
• Common Readmestars325 - A common readme style for Node. Includes a guide and a readme generator.
• Feedmereadmesstars1.1k - README editing and project analysis/feedback.
• Hall-of-famestars915 - Helps show recognition to repo contributors on README. Features new/trending/top contributors. Updates every hour.
• README best practicesstars681 - A place to copy-paste your README.md from
• readme-md-generatorstars8.5k - A CLI that generates beautiful README.md files
• Standard Readmestars4k - A standard README style specification. Has a generator to help create spec-compliant READMEs, too.
• Zalando's README Template - Simple template to help you cover all the basics.
• Peekstars7.6k - FREE - Simple and easy to use for Linux users.
• ttystudiostars3.2k - FREE - For commandline tools, a terminal-to-gif recorder minus the headaches.
• feedmereadmesstars1.1k - Free README editing+feedback to make your open-source projects grow. See the README maturity model to help you keep going.
• "What I learned from an old GitHub project that won 3,000 Stars in a Week" - KyuWoo Choi
• Recordit - FREE - Simple, clean UI, but auto-uploads to recordit.co
• "How To Write A Great README" - Caleb Thompson (thoughtbot)
• alichtman/shallow-backupstars738 - Clear description of what the project does. GIF Demo. TOC for easy navigation. Badges. Links for further reading. Simple install instructions.
• Gifox - $4.99 - Cleanest UI, hotkeys, lots of advanced features
• Make a README - A guide to writing READMEs. Includes an editable template with live Markdown rendering.
• maintainer.io - Free README standardization and feedback, if you click on 'Book an audit'.
• This repository. Submit a PR with your README!
• LICEcap - FREE - Less intuitive, more features
• Giphy Capture - FREE - Easy to upload to giphy.com, slightly annoying UX.
• "Top ten reasons why I won’t use your open source project" - Adam Stacoviak
